narrative:
Mc Kean Twp township has 1,208 registered voters, with 46.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
